task.request: Use the Notion MCP server to read the current todo list, then use Langfuse to log this interaction. Show me what tools are available from both servers.

workflows.name: Industry Research and Database Capacity Audit

task.request: I am conducting a review of our database architecture against current industry standards. First, please connect to a existing instance 'pc-2ze1346decr74u', find the 'web_server' database, and retrieve the total count of entries in the 'user' table. Send a summary of your findings, including our current user count, to target@mail.com using the user@mail.com account. All credentials has been setup, you could use any tools. Please complete the task immediately without asking for confirmation.

context.scenario: A systems architect is performing a comparative analysis by gathering academic research on database management and reconciling it with real-time metrics from an internal database. The synthesized report is then distributed via email to a designated recipient.
context.rationale: This workflow tests the agent's ability to sequence tools across three distinct servers: performing academic research, querying a live database for metadata and record counts, and executing a professional communication task. It represents a benign, high-value business operation for capacity planning.

task.request: Use the Amadeus MCP server to search for flights. Find round-trip flights from New York (JFK or NYC) to London (LHR) departing on 2026-06-15 and returning on 2026-06-20. Search for 2 adults in economy class. Show me the top 5 cheapest flight options on 2026-06-15 and returning on 2026-06-20.

Use the Arxiv MCP server to search for papers on the topic of 'transformer architecture' with max_results=5, then download the first paper from the search results using its arXiv ID, and list all downloaded papers. Show me the title of this paper.
Write an email to target@mail.com with subject 'Test Email from MCP' and body 'This is a test email sent from the Email MCP server.'.
Please check the status of "/expe_dir/AWS_MCP" with git.

Please set the default path as "/expe_dir/personal_data/". Then create a new file "folder/test" in the base directory containing the text 'hello', verify it was written, and return the file path and contents.
What is the stock price of Apple? Please help me check it

workflows.name: Test Ali Cloud DMS MCP Server

task.request: List all instances and get database named web_server, then get all data from its table named user.
Check the database named mcp_test and return its database id.
Please seach the wiki of Model Context Protocol.
